<think> I know that Ritchie Valens was a famous musician who tragically died young, and Los Lobos is a band that has covered many classic songs. I also recall that Ritchie Valens was a key figure in the 1950s rock and roll scene. I'm going to try to connect the dots between Ritchie Valens, Los Lobos, and a record company. I think I remember that Ritchie Valens was signed to Del-Fi Records, and Los Lobos has covered one of his most famous songs, "La Bamba". Del-Fi Records was founded by Bob Keane. I'm going to take a chance and say that Bob Keane owned Del-Fi Records during the time Ritchie Valens sang the song most notably covered by Los Lobos. </think>
<answer> Bob Keane </answer>
